theme_notes: Wembanyama leads Spurs past Thunder to set up a Spurs-Knicks NBA Finals rematch; US-Iran ceasefire negotiations with Trump editing the deal, Hegseth threatening resumed strikes, and the Strait of Hormuz on the table; PSG Champions League back-to-back aftermath with Gabriel Magalhães's missed penalty still raw.
settled: Even the Iran ceasefire is more settled than you two were last month.
Balanced. Like the Budapest final, but nobody here missed a penalty.
Clean. Wembanyama still dunks on you, but financially you're equals.
youOwe: Cheaper than Arsenal's flight home from Budapest. Way cheaper.
Wembanyama's post-game handshake requires more effort than paying this.
A debt so small even the US-Iran negotiators could wrap it up in a bathroom break.
Nosebleed seats for Wembanyama vs the Knicks cost this. You owe a basketball game.
You've been stalling longer than the US-Iran ceasefire took to almost collapse.
PSG spent this per minute of extra time in Budapest. You've been dragging for months.
About what the US spends per Pacific strike. Significantly less fallout.
Trump personally edited the Iran deal for smaller concessions. Consider that.
Enough to have flown to Budapest and watched Arsenal lose on penalties. Small mercies.
The Knicks last won a title in 1973. Your debt has that same vintage energy.
The Strait of Hormuz is more open right now than your wallet.
Hegseth said the US is postured stronger than day one. Your partner agrees.
You are Iran in this dynamic. Stalling, negotiating, never quite closing.
PSG won back-to-back. Your debt is on pace for a historic third.
Wembanyama earns this in eleven minutes of game time. Let that sit.
The US took out 205 people over drug boats this week. Your partner reads the news.
A 60-day ceasefire extension with Iran costs less diplomatic capital than this tab.
Pancreatic cancer finally has a pill. Your balance has no known cure.
theyOwe: They owe you less than an Arsenal scarf from Budapest. Still. Principle.
Almost not worth mentioning. But here you are. Mentioning it.
Wembanyama tips more than this. You deserve that energy back.
Arsenal needed a better penalty taker. You need a better collection strategy.
Enough for courtside drinks at Spurs-Knicks. Not that they'd buy.
Iran negotiated harder for the Strait of Hormuz. Stop being so agreeable.
That's half a Wembanyama rookie card. A very tall, very valuable half.
The ceasefire required bigger concessions than this. Somehow they're still stalling.
You could've gone to Budapest and watched Arsenal lose on penalties. Instead, this.
Hegseth would resume operations for less. You have the same authority.
PSG are back-to-back champions. You're a back-to-back creditor. One of you is winning.
The Knicks are in the Finals for the first time in decades. Your patience ran out first.
The US-Iran deal is 60 days. Give them 30. Mean it.
Gabriel Magalhães missed a Champions League final penalty. Your partner missed your last nerve.
Wembanyama will retire, the Knicks will choke, and this debt will outlast both.
The Strait of Hormuz carries 20% of the world's oil. You're carrying more.
The US resumed strikes over smaller concessions. Your options exist on a spectrum.
Pancreatic cancer has a pill now. This financial prognosis does not.
